ksa_text: Knowledge of AI model supply chain security and risk management, including third-party component risks, open-source model adoption risks, fine-tuning pipeline integrity, dataset provenance verification, and model registry controls.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure security design and cybersecurity development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of security implementation) and updated as necessary.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies and procedures are in place to address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software and data and other supply chain issues.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies and procedures are in place to address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software and data and other supply chain issues.
Ensure security design and cybersecurity development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of security implementation) and updated as necessary.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-013 (SP, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4594 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.459, nist_ai_rmf=0.425, dcwf=0.414) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4594 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does SP-domain KSA SP-K-013 (composite 0.4594) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: SP domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST CSF, ISO 27001; security competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data access controls awareness, not security architecture. Composite 0.4594 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms SP domain KSA at composite 0.4594 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4594, domain SP, scope weak fit. High confidence.
